build: Build #23 — 403 Forbidden + GitHub API error JSON

ui_result.warning_message: Access denied. You do not have permission to view this. For more on scraping GitHub and how it may affect your rights, please review our Terms of Service (https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/github-terms/github-terms-of-service)
ui_result.user_experience: Clear warning banner shown in chat area with yellow background. Loading spinner visible below warning.

diagnosis.conclusion: Build #23 (403 Forbidden) works correctly for Copilot. APF detected PII pattern (주민번호) and returned 403. Copilot frontend interprets 403 as 'Access denied' and shows a visible warning banner. This is a significant improvement over Build #22 (200 OK) which showed only 'interrupted' message.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build22: Build #22 (200 OK + chat completion JSON) showed 'Copilot was interrupted' — user sees generic error. Build #23 (403 Forbidden) shows explicit 'Access denied' warning — user sees clear access denial.
diagnosis.recommendation: 403 Forbidden strategy is effective for Copilot. Warning message comes from GitHub's own error handling for 403 responses.
